taskSummary: Fix the production /api/ai-rewrite path after PR #428 reached main but Step 1 still showed Suggestions are temporarily unavailable.
productionEvidence: research-operations.com /api/ai-rewrite?mode=description returned 503 AI_UNAVAILABLE from main Worker SHA afb13173d115e03c24b11ae48fa5eb1860d647e7
response headers showed the Pages advanced Worker proxy reached the expected upstream Worker
rootCause: The AI rewrite service returned 503 AI_UNAVAILABLE whenever env.AI.run threw. PR #428 fixed origin/proxy access, but the upstream Worker still failed at the Workers AI runtime call and the UI had no structured response to render.
implementation: Added deterministic server-side review and rewrite fallback for missing AI binding, thrown Workers AI calls and invalid model output.
Returned fallback output with HTTP 200 and flags.ai_unavailable true.
Removed bracketed placeholder fallback from the live response path.
Changed Step 1 and Step 2 panels to say Review summary and to report rule-based suggestions when fallback output is shown.
Removed duplicated Suggestions / Bias & Inclusion output from the AI rewrite panel.
Changed the rewrite contract to markdown syntax inside the JSON rewrite field.
Rendered the rewrite preview as sanitized markdown HTML while preserving raw markdown for textarea replacement.
Updated the local scorer to recognise markdown Scope, Research questions and Deliverables headings.
Removed unused ai-sugg-* Start route styles.
Added boundary-aware rewrite clamping so long markdown output is not cut off mid-word or mid-sentence.
Reduced fallback rewrite repetition so the Data handling section fits as a complete section.
Added regression coverage for the reported accessibility b cutoff and for a complete Data handling sentence.
Removed the app-side rewrite character cap entirely.
Removed the boundary-aware clamping helper because a complete rewrite is required, not a better truncated rewrite.
Removed the model instruction that asked for a rewrite of 1800 characters or fewer.
Increased the Workers AI token budget for the JSON response so summary, suggestions and the full markdown rewrite have room to complete.
Removed fallback section fitting so rule-based fallback output returns all generated markdown sections.
Updated AI rewrite guardrail whitespace cleanup so quantifier, method and bias post-processing preserve markdown line breaks.
Added regression coverage proving model rewrite output longer than the old limit is preserved through the final Data handling sentence.

validation.command: local response-shape check with missing AI binding
validation.result: returned 200, flags.ai_unavailable true, 3 suggestions and rewrite beginning with Research focus

validation.command: npx prettier -c infra/cloudflare/src/core/ai-rewrite.js infra/cloudflare/src/core/ai-rewrite/fallback.js public/js/start-description-assist.js public/js/start-objectives-assist.js tests/ai-rewrite-ai-fallback.test.js tests/ai-rewrite-split-route-state.test.js

npx eslint infra/cloudflare/src/core/ai-rewrite.js infra/cloudflare/src/core/ai-rewrite/fallback.js public/js/start-description-assist.js public/js/start-objectives-assist.js tests/ai-rewrite-ai-fallback.test.js tests/ai-rewrite-split-route-state.test.js
validation.result: passed with no errors; reported no-console warnings from audit/client diagnostics
confirmed zero duplicate AI suggestion grids, markdown rendered as HTML, replacement wrote markdown into the textarea, and local scoring rerendered to favourable empty states
passed after boundary-aware clamping amendment, 11 tests

validation.command: local response check with the reported Step 1 wording
validation.result: confirmed the fallback rewrite includes a complete Data handling section ending with storage arrangements and does not end with the partial text accessibility b
passed after removing the rewrite character cap, 12 tests

validation.command: local response check with a mocked model rewrite longer than the old 1800-character limit
validation.result: confirmed the response keeps the final Data handling heading and final sentence

residualRisk: The user-facing feature remains useful during Workers AI failures, but production Worker logs should still be reviewed for ai.run.fail to diagnose why the live Workers AI call failed.
